description:
Upgrade the thermal insulation of an existing home's roof and walls by lowering their U-values, run a Daily Energy Analysis to observe the impact, and save the retrofitted model.

1. Open the file `~/Documents/Energy3D/building-roof-insulation.ng3`.
2. Select the Roof of the main building and change its U-value to exactly 0.11 W/m2*K (simulating R-50 insulation).
3. Select all the Walls of the building and change their U-values to exactly 0.24 W/m2*K (simulating R-24 insulation).
4. Run a Daily Energy Analysis (Analysis menu > Buildings > Daily Energy Analysis or similar) to compute the new heat loss.
5. Take a screenshot of the Energy3D window showing the Daily Energy Analysis graph and save it to `~/Documents/Energy3D/retrofit_analysis.png`.
6. Save the modified project as a new file at `~/Documents/Energy3D/retrofitted_building.ng3`.
